title: Creative One-Punch
description: One-Punch any entity while in creative mode
body:
One-Punch any entity while in creative mode, as long as you're not holding a weapon.


![Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Fourmisain/CreativeOnePunch/1.17/BHuehD2.png)
Awesome logo by [@oliwoli](https://github.com/oliwoli), a big thank you!

* works on *any* Minecraft version that Fabric supports, from 1.14 to at least ~~1.18~~ ~~1.19~~ ~~1.20~~ ~~1.21~~ 26.1
* requires Fabric Loader 0.12+
* works server-only

Since 1.8 there is now a  a `creativeonepunch.json` config file with:  
  `damage`: the damage dealt, defaults to 9999  
  `forceKill`: bypasses any invulnerability checks, defaults to `false`  
  `requireSneak`: whether One-Punching only works when sneaking, defaults to `false`
